finding: Dental visit > 6 months ago OR pending dental work
action: Instruct patient to complete dental clearance before Consultation.
evaluation_question: Has the patient had a dental visit within the last 6 months, AND do they have no pending dental work?

action: Refer to Smoking Cessation education/support; pause case for 3 months.
evaluation_question: Is the patient a current smoker, or did they quit smoking less than 3 months ago?

finding: No attempt at PT or Exercise
action: Refer to 6-12 week conservative physical therapy trial.
evaluation_question: Has the patient made a meaningful attempt at physical therapy or structured exercise for the joint complaint? A few sessions does NOT count as a meaningful attempt - the SOP requires a real conservative trial.

action: Flag for Clinical MD Review for glucose optimization.
evaluation_question: Did the patient report a most-recent HbA1c value greater than 7.0?

action: Flag for Anesthesia High Risk Consult.
evaluation_question: Has the patient been using opioid pain medication daily (or near-daily) for more than 3 months?

action: Flag as Revision Case; requires specialized surgical review.
evaluation_question: Does the patient have a history of any prior weight-loss / bariatric surgery (band, sleeve, bypass, etc.)?

action: Instruct patient to schedule EGD after Consultation.
evaluation_question: For a bariatric case, has the patient had an endoscopy (EGD) within the last 3 months?

action: Provide in-network RD list; patient must confirm RD before referral.
evaluation_question: For a bariatric case, has the patient identified a Registered Dietician (RD) they are working with? A one-time visit with a nutritionist does NOT count - the SOP requires an established RD.
